npcs.name: Dr. Vance
npcs.title: Station Commander
npcs.description: A veteran space explorer and scientist who runs the Sol Station.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome, pilot! I'm Dr. Vance. If you need guidance, I'm here to help.
idle: Space is vast, but humanity perseveres.
Have you visited the Borealis system yet? Fascinating phenomena there.
Always keep your ship in good condition.

npcs.name: Merchant Joe
npcs.title: Trader
npcs.description: A shrewd merchant who deals in all manner of goods.

dialogue.greeting: Looking to buy or sell? You've come to the right place!
idle: Best prices in the sector, guaranteed!
Mining is profitable if you know where to look.
I've got weapons, equipment, you name it.
dialogue.farewell: Come back when you've got credits to spend!

npcs.name: Researcher Maya
npcs.title: Xenobiologist
npcs.description: Studies the mysterious Ice Sprites and other alien life.

dialogue.greeting: Oh, a visitor! I don't get many out here. The Ice Sprites usually scare everyone off.
idle: The Ice Sprites are fascinating creatures. Dangerous, but fascinating.
This cold is nothing compared to the mysteries it hides.
I believe the sprites are protecting something. But what?
dialogue.farewell: Don't let the cold get to you!

npcs.name: Dr. Quinn
npcs.title: Astrophysicist
npcs.description: Studies the radiation anomalies in Nebula Prime.

dialogue.greeting: Careful with the radiation out here. It does strange things to equipment... and people.
idle: The nebula's colors are caused by ionized gas. Beautiful, isn't it?
My sensors keep picking up anomalous readings from the core.
Something is generating massive energy bursts. I need more data.
